recommendations.title: Head Over Heels
recommendations.overview: After being left by her husband and fired from her work, a workaholic, thirtysomething businesswoman is forced to go through a big change in her life and becomes a partner on a decadent sex shop.

recommendations.title: Piper
recommendations.overview: A mother bird tries to teach her little one how to find food by herself. In the process, she encounters a traumatic experience that she must overcome in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Twin Sitters
recommendations.overview: An evil business executive is releasing dangerous toxins and the Barbarian Brothers set out to stop his evil work.

recommendations.title: How to Marry a Millionaire
recommendations.overview: Three women set out to find eligible millionaires to marry, but find true love in the process.

recommendations.title: Ready to Mingle
recommendations.overview: A wannabe bride seeks professional help to find a husband and in the process finds herself.

recommendations.title: Like Father
recommendations.overview: When a workaholic young executive is left at the altar, she ends up on her Caribbean honeymoon cruise with the last person she ever expected: her estranged and equally workaholic father. The two depart as strangers, but over the course of a few hilar

recommendations.title: Cow Belles
recommendations.overview: In order to learn how to be responsible, two wealthy teen sisters are forced to work in the family business by their exasperated father. When company funds goes missing, it's up to the girls to save the day.

recommendations.title: Baby Mama
recommendations.overview: A successful, single businesswoman who dreams of having a baby discovers she is infertile and hires a working class woman to be her unlikely surrogate.

recommendations.title: Notorious
recommendations.overview: In order to help bring Nazis to justice, U.S. government agent T.R. Devlin recruits Alicia Huberman, the American daughter of a convicted German war criminal, as a spy. As they begin to fall for one another, Alicia is instructed to win the affections

recommendations.title: The Paper
recommendations.overview: Henry Hackett is the workaholic editor of a New York City tabloid. He loves his job, but the long hours and low pay are leading to discontent. Also, publisher Bernie White faces financial straits, and has hatchet-man Alicia Clark—Henry's nemesis—impo
